DICEFIX.MainToggleHint: Enable or disable the functionality of the module.
DICEFIX.GeneralFlavorHint: Customize which parts of your dice are flavored.
DICEFIX.FullFlavorHint: This overrides all damage dice that were selected in the Damage Type Menu to a preconfigured colorset for each damage type.
DICEFIX.PartialFlavorHint: Choose wich parts of your custom dice get flavored. The colors will be taken from the preconfigured colorsets for each damage type.
DICEFIX.PrecisionFlavorHint: Choose the base of your precision dice.
DICEFIX.DiceFullyReplaced: Currently your damage dice will be fully replaced.
DICEFIX.DicePartiallyReplaced: Currently your damage dice use custom accents:
DICEFIX.PrecisionFlavorHintSecondaryDice: Choose the base dice the accents will be taken from.
DICEFIX.PartialPrecisionFlavorHint: Choose the accents of your precision dice.
DICEFIX.advReplacementLabel: Enable further customization for precision dice.
DICEFIX.advReplacementLabelMaterial: Enable further customization for material dice.
DICEFIX.FlavorByDmgTypeHint: Enable and disable flavors for each damage type.
DICEFIX.FlavorByMatTypeHint: Enable and disable flavors for each precious material.
DICEFIX.MaterialFlavorHint: Customize how precious material colorsets are applied.
DICEFIX.materialFlavorHintSecondaryDice: Choose the base dice the accents will be taken from.
DICEFIX.PartialmaterialFlavorHint: Choose the accents of your material dice.
DICEFIX.materialOverridePhysicalHint: Applies precious material colorsets to blunt, slashing and piercing damage rolls if applicable.
DICEFIX.materialOverrideElementalHint: Applies precious material colorsets to non-physical damage rolls if applicable.
DICEFIX.precisionOverrideMaterialHint: Applies the precision colorset to precious material rolls if applicable.
DICEFIX.MaterialDiceFullyReplaced: Currently your material dice will be fully replaced with :
DICEFIX.MaterialDicePartiallyReplaced: Currently your material dice use those settings:
